title: THRIFT STORE - 211info
text: SHARING HANDS THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates a thrift store that sells new and used appliances, clothes, electronics, and miscellaneous household goods. Accepts donations in good working condition. 107 W Bishop Way Brownsville, OR 97327 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (541) 466-3003 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 466-3003 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Store: Walk in Donations: Call or visit website for donation items accepted FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Exit 216 off I-5. East on Highway 228 (Halsey-Sweet Home Highway) for 4 miles to Brownsville. Sharing Hands is on the right just past Chevron Station and Assembly of God church. Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Kitchenware Donation Programs Sports Equipment Donation Programs Thrift Shops Toy/Game Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD BANK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SHARING HANDS
